tender.description: Under the Business Plan 2026-27 scheme, strengthening of 33 KV, 11 KV, LT lines, work of construction and bifurcation of 11 KV line and capacity increase of 11/0.4 KV distribution transformers and work of 11/0.4 KV additional transformer capacity
